ui.title: SCF Onboarding Activity
ui.desc: Onboarding requests and customer registration statuses.

data.sql: SELECT C_MAIN_REF,C_UNIT_CODE,PARTY_NM,FST_CNTC_NM,EMAIL_ADD,TEL_NO,CUST_CITY,FA_CUST_BK_NM,FA_CUST_ACC_NO,EE_CUSTOMER,REJECTION_FLAG FROM %EXIMTRX%.STAT_CE_CP WHERE (( EE_CUSTOMER ='YES'AND REJ_REASON IS NULL) OR( EE_CUSTOMER ='YES'AND REJ_REASON IS NOT NULL AND REJECTION_FLAG ='YES')  )   and C_MAIN_REF IN (select C_MAIN_REF from %EXIMTRX%.STAT_MASTER where C_TRX_STATUS = 'M'  AND (C_CP_UNIT_CODE ='CSBANK' OR C_UNIT_CODE='CSBANK') )  AND (C_CP_UNIT_CODE ='CSBANK' OR C_UNIT_CODE='CSBANK')
